title: Molecular Detection of Phytoplasmas and Xylella spp. in Quarantine Plants
author: Takao Ito
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.vvme646

steps.title: Put leaf petioles (＜50mg), a metal...
steps.instruction: Put leaf petioles (＜50mg), a metal beads, and 1mL extraction buffer into a tube. 1.1.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a new tube. Next steps, or keep it in a freezer.

steps.title: Add an equal volume of cold...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of cold isopropanol to the crude extract and mix. 1.2.

steps.title: Suspend the pellet in one-fifth volume of TE
steps.instruction: Suspend the pellet in one-fifth volume of TE. Next steps, or keep it in a freezer.

steps.title: Reagent mixture %s %s %s %s...
steps.instruction: Reagent mixture %s %s %s %s Reagents %s %s 1 reaction %s %s 10 reactions %s %s Sterile water %s %s 2.5 %s %s 25 %s %s TaqMan FAST Advanced Master Mix %s %s 5 %s %s 50 %s %s Primer mixture %s %s 1 %s %s 10 %s %s Probe mixture %s %s 1 %s %s 10 %s %s Total (µL) %s %s 9.5 %s %s 95 %s %s %s %s 2.

steps.title: Dispense 9
steps.instruction: Dispense 9.5 µL of the reagent mixture to PCR tubes %s %s 2.

steps.title: Set the tubes and run the...
steps.instruction: Set the tubes and run the StepOnePlus with the following parameters: %s %s 50℃ 2 min. → 95℃ 20 sec. → %s %s 95℃ 1 sec. → 60℃ 20 sec. （50 cycles） %s %s * Targets（Reporter/Quencher）：PP（FAM/NFQ-MGB）、XL（VIC/NFQ-MGB）、IC（TAMRA/None） %s %s

steps.title: Consider positives of PP/XL at Ct<45 and IC at Ct<
steps.instruction: Consider positives of PP/XL at Ct<45 and IC at Ct<

steps.title: Refer the PDF file (a protocol...
steps.instruction: Refer the PDF file (a protocol in Japanese and English) in the Absract for detail.
